summary_en: 4,104,300 shares acquired cumulatively (0.25% of shares outstanding) for ¥22.47B as of 31 May 2026, within authorization limit of 20M shares (1.2% S/O) and ¥60B. May 2026 tranche: 3,534,400 shares, ¥19.08B. Execution window 5 February 2026–29 January 2027.
title_en: Notice of acquisition status of treasury shares
translation_en_brief: Marubeni Corporation filed notice on 1 June 2026 of treasury share acquisition progress under the buyback program authorized by board resolutions on 4 February 2026 and 1 May 2026. As of 31 May 2026, the company has cumulatively acquired 4,104,300 shares for ¥22.47 billion, representing 0.25% of shares outstanding. The May 2026 tranche alone comprised 3,534,400 shares purchased for ¥19.08 billion during the period 1–31 May 2026. The authorization permits acquisition of up to 20 million shares (approximately 1.2% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) and up to ¥60 billion in aggregate, over the window 5 February 2026 to 29 January 2027. Cumulative consumption stands at 20.5% of the share limit and 37.4% of the yen limit.
